title: unnesting scalar subquery containing count and having cond produces wrong result
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER NOT NULL, b TEXT);
CREATE TABLE t2(a INTEGER, c REAL DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT COALESCE(derived.cnt, 0) FROM t1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT COUNT(1) AS cnt, t2.a FROM t2 GROUP BY t2.a HAVING cnt > 0) AS derived ON derived.a = t1.a;
key_bug_features: unnesting scalar subquery with count and having condition
